p.strong: Running recovery N times produces identical state S1

text.tspan: // this or later change already on disk
// this or later change already on disk

div.p: LSN 100: T1 BEGIN LSN 150: T1 UPDATE P1 (A→B) LSN 200: T1 COMMIT LSN 250: T2 BEGIN LSN 300: T2 UPDATE P2 (X→Y) LSN 350: CLR undo LSN 300 undo_next_lsn: 0 LSN 400: T2 ABORT
